{{Quote|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer ''Protector'' is to rendezvous with escort carrier ''Tropsobor'' near Gerbaud 2. ''Tropsobor'' is delivering the new TIE Advanced, or "Avenger" as the test pilots like to call it.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|<ref name="TF" />}}
'''Gerbaud 2''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a part of the [[Sepan sector/Legends|Sepan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Dimoks and the Ripoblus are hoping to catch us while we're vulnerable with a joint attack.|Imperial briefing officer|<ref name="TF" />}}
It was over Gerbaud 2 that numerous prototype [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] were to be transferred from the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|escort carrier]] ''[[Tropsobor]]'' to the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]; though a front from both the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] and the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] [[Raid on the Tropsobor|thwarted]] the exchange.<ref name="TF" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', indicated in [[April]] [[2023]] that [[Gaerboud IV]] originally was a misspelling of Gerbaud 2.<ref name="Email">{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion 2023 2.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2023-04-07}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
